name: askk-lsp-ts-worker
description: Builds the TypeScript/JavaScript language-service Web Worker (assets/lsp_ts_worker.js) consumed by the ASKK workspace IDE's CM6 editor. Fully offline: the TypeScript compiler and the lib.*.d.ts default libraries are embedded in the bundle. Run `bun install && bun run build` after editing entry.js or bumping deps, then commit the regenerated asset.
